text:
is a Japanese director, storyboarder and animator.

Works

Theatrical Films

Evangelion: Death and Rebirth (1997) - Key Animation (Death)
The End of Evangelion (1997) - Key Animation (ep 26)
Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance (2009) - Storyboard, Assistant Director, Key Animation
Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo (2012) - Assistant Director, Image Board
planetarian: Hoshi no Hito (2016) - Series Director, Storyboard, Unit Director
Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time (2021) - Director, Key Animation

TV Anime/OVA

Neon Genesis Evangelion (anime) (1995) - Key Animation (eps 1, 5, 7, 9, 15, 19, 23, 24, 25, 26)
The Good Witch of the West (2006) - Director, Storyboard , Episode Director
planetarian (2016) - Series Director, Storyboard (ED; eps 2, 5), Episode Director (eps 2, 5), Unit Director (ED)
Full Metal Panic! Invisible Victory (2018) - Director, Storyboard, Episode Director, Key Animation
